summary: Validated Product JSON-LD `offers` block on deployed California Cooperage static site. All 23 pytest checks passed (structure, priceSpecification, seller, canonical URLs on canonical host, non-product page absence, sitemap, 301 uppercase redirect).
critical_code_review_comments: build-static.js line 311 emits price as string '0' — acceptable but Google's Rich Results Test sometimes prefers numeric 0; test accepts both.

Note: frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL points to https://california-cooperage.preview.emergentagent.com while the review_request used https://cba431d2-...preview.emergentagent.com — both currently serve identical content. Not a bug, just an observation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests hit the preview host directly and parse every <script type=application/ld+json> block with json.loads. Product schema is only expected on /cr1, /cr2, /cr3. seller.url and offers.url point to the canonical https://californiacooperagehottubs.com/find-a-dealer host by design (JSON-LD SEO metadata should reference the canonical domain, not the preview one).

test_coverage_detail.priceSpecification: PASS — description matches 'Contact an authorized California Cooperage dealer for current pricing.'
test_coverage_detail.seller: PASS — Organization named 'California Cooperage Authorized Dealer Network' with canonical url
test_coverage_detail.jsonld_parseability: PASS — all JSON-LD blocks on product pages are valid JSON
test_coverage_detail.coexistence: PASS — Organization, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage still present on product pages
